compiled_state.title: Refactor design-approve.sh to use ticket tag/untag
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Replace ~8-line read-merge-write tag logic in plugins/dso/scripts/design-approve.sh with: _run_ticket tag "$story_id" "$TAG_APPROVED" and _run_ticket untag "$story_id" "$TAG_AWAITING_IMPORT". Pre-execution guard: verify ticket-tag.sh and ticket-untag.sh exist AND dispatcher routes tag/untag subcommands before making changes. Depends on Task 1 (f58e-336f) being complete.
